message:
feat: add Stripe subscription tiers with usage enforcement

Implements four billing tiers (Basic $29.99, Pro $49.99, Enterprise $99.99,
Contact Us) with per-user active pair and monthly repo init limits enforced
server-side via Firestore. Stripe Checkout, Customer Portal, and webhook
handling are fully integrated with idempotency guards and atomic counters.

- lib/billing: tiers config, Firestore subscription/usage repo, usage snapshot
  and limit guards, lazy Stripe client (API 2026-03-25.dahlia)
- API: /billing/checkout, /billing/portal, /billing/usage, /billing/contact,
  /webhooks/stripe (raw-body signature verification, event idempotency)
- Gated POST /api/repo-pairs and POST /api/github/init-doc-repo with 402 on
  limit breach; revalidatePath keeps frontend counters current after mutations
- Dashboard: active pair counter (n/limit) on integrations page, toast on cap,
  upgrade-or-wait card in empty slots when monthly inits are exhausted
- Settings: full billing panel with usage bars, cycle reset date, manage plan
  and upgrade CTAs replacing the coming-soon placeholder
- Pricing section: four real tiers from tiers.ts with live Checkout CTAs and
  inline Contact Us modal with rate limiting
- Toast system: Framer Motion toast provider mounted in dashboard layout

feat: replace free tier with 7-day trial, enforce expiry end to end

- Add trialStartedAt/trialEndsAt to SubscriptionDoc
- ensureTrialSubscription() auto-creates trial on first usage check
- getUsageSnapshot blocks canAddPair/canInitRepo after trial expires
- Pricing grid now shows Trial card first with Start free trial link to /sign-up
- Dashboard shows amber countdown banner and red expired banner
- Fix hardcoded upgrade plan values (Basic 3/5, Pro 10/20, Enterprise 25/60 $149.99)

feat: surface pricing on landing page with yearly toggle

Add PricingSection to the home page between Stats and CTA, restyle
to match the landing theme (motion stagger, primary glow, highlighted
Pro tier), and add a monthly/yearly billing toggle that applies a 10%
yearly discount. Wire billingCycle through the checkout API with
STRIPE_PRICE_ID_*_YEARLY env vars, and resolve either cycle's price ID
in getTierByPriceId for webhook handling.
